---
title: "Pfizer"
---

# Financial Statements

-   [Financials Website](https://investors.pfizer.com/Investors/Financials/Quarterly-Results/)

| Year | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 2021 | [2021 Q1](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2021/q1/Q1-2021-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2021 Q2](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2021/q2/Q2-2021-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2021 Q3](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2021/q3/Q3-2021-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2021 Q4](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2021/q4/Q4-2021-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) |
| 2022 | [2022 Q1](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2022/q1/Q1-2022-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2022 Q2](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2022/q2/Q2-2022-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2022 Q3](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2022/q3/Q3-2022-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2022 Q4](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2022/q4/Q4-2022-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) |
| 2023 | [2023 Q1](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2023/q1/Q1-2023-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2023 Q2](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2023/q2/Q2-2023-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2023 Q3](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2023/q3/Q3-2023-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2023 Q4](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2023/q4/Q4-2023-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) |
| 2024 | [2024 Q1](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2024/q1/Q1-2024-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2024 Q2](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2024/q2/Q2-2024-PFE-Earnings-Release.pdf) | [2024 Q3](https://s28.q4cdn.com/781576035/files/doc_financials/2024/q3/Q3-2024-PFE-Earnings-Release-Final.pdf) |  |
